'''vaguku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squarer|squarer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squarer|squarer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vaguku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vægikith|vægikith]] || [[word:vægikij|vægikij]] || [[word:vægikish|vægikish]] || [[word:vægiki|vægiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vagugukuth|vagugukuth]] || [[word:vagugukuj|vagugukuj]] || [[word:vagugukush|vagugukush]] || [[word:vaguguku|vaguguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vagukuth|vagukuth]] || [[word:vagukuj|vagukuj]] || [[word:vagukush|vagukush]] || [[word:vaguku|vaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vagufkuth|vagufkuth]] || [[word:vagufkuj|vagufkuj]] || [[word:vagufkush|vagufkush]] || [[word:vagufkuf|vagufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vagukuthu|vagukuthu]] || [[word:vagukuju|vagukuju]] || [[word:vagukushu|vagukushu]] || [[word:vagukuku|vagukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vagukuth|vagukuth]] || [[word:vagukuj|vagukuj]] || [[word:vagukush|vagukush]] || [[word:vaguku|vaguku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vagukuthul|vagukuthul]] || [[word:vagukujul|vagukujul]] || [[word:vagukushul|vagukushul]] || [[word:vagukukul|vagukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vagukuthuthu|vagukuthuthu]] || [[word:vagukujuju|vagukujuju]] || [[word:vagukushushu|vagukushushu]] || [[word:vagukuku|vagukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vagukuthun|vagukuthun]] || [[word:vagukujun|vagukujun]] || [[word:vagukushun|vagukushun]] || [[word:vagukukun|vagukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vagukuthuoro|vagukuthuoro]] || [[word:vagukujuoro|vagukujuoro]] || [[word:vagukushuoro|vagukushuoro]] || [[word:vagukukuoro|vagukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
